description: The viral slide-puzzle game about combining tiles with matching numbers to reach the legendary 2048 tile.
instructions: Use your arrow keys or swipe to move the tiles. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one!

title: Clumsy Bird
description: A beautiful, lightweight open-source clone of Flappy Bird. Flap your wings, avoid the obstacles, and get the high score.
instructions: Click, tap, or press Spacebar to flap your wings and fly. Guide the bird safely through the gaps between the pipes.

title: Hextris
description: A fast-paced hexagonal puzzle game inspired by Tetris. Rotate the central hexagon to match and clear incoming color blocks.
instructions: Use Left and Right arrow keys (or tap the sides) to rotate the hexagon. Stack three or more blocks of the same color to destroy them.

title: Retro Snake
description: The absolute classic arcade game. Steer the snake, eat the food nuggets, and grow longer without crashing into the walls or yourself.
instructions: Use the Arrow Keys on your keyboard to instantly control the direction of the snake. Collect the colored foods to grow and gain points.

title: Pacman HTML5
description: Feed on all the yellow dots in the classic maze while evading Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde. Grab power pellets to strike back!
instructions: Use the Arrow Keys (Up, Down, Left, Right) to guide Pac-Man through the screen. Clear all the dots to move to the next stage.

title: Sinuous
description: A simple and addictive mouse-coordinated particle survival game. Evade the dangerous red dots, collect shields, and get multipliers.
instructions: Move your cursor (or drag your finger) to control your particle. Avoid colliding with any red dots. Collect blue and green power-ups to protect yourself.

title: Speed Typer
description: Challenge your words-per-minute speed and typing accuracy in this engaging text racer. See how many words you can smash under time pressure.
instructions: Type the displayed words as fast as you can. Every correct word extends the countdown clock. Keep typing to rack up a high multiplier!
